shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot standing before a named review card, illustrating the identity-first design decision at the heart of Yelp.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot standing before a named review card, illustrating the identity-first design decision at the heart of Yelp.
assets.prompt: Yelp's Reviewer Identity | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a large review card on a cream background. The card shows a star rating with a name and profile photo placeholder on it — the name is visible, not anonymized. Hatch's expression is thoughtful, cap slightly tilted. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

The contrast is the point. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. assets.prompt: Yelp's Reviewer Identity | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a Yelp-style reviewer profile card. The card shows a stack of reviews with vote counts, a photo avatar, and an "Elite" badge. Hatch points to the badge with one arm and to the vote count with the other, illustrating how identity creates accountability. Cream background, no copy. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker.
